checks.name: Typography — page titles text-2xl font-bold, section headings text-base font-semibold
checks.evidence: PageHeader.tsx: text-2xl font-extrabold (slight enhancement over spec font-bold). Dashboard inline h1: text-2xl font-bold. Section headings: text-base font-semibold on page.tsx:714 and multiple components. Compliant.

checks.name: Stat Cards — sparklines 60px, trend (24h), anomaly color-coded dots
checks.evidence: SparklineChart.tsx: height default=60. Dashboard page.tsx:1030 passes height={60} explicitly. Trend shows '(24h)' suffix at page.tsx:1018. AnomalyWidget: color-coded dots (red/yellow/blue rounded-full) confirmed at AnomalyWidget.tsx:30-38.

checks.name: Table Hovers — hover:bg-muted/50, cursor-pointer, alerts bulk action bar
checks.evidence: DataTable.tsx:298 has hover:bg-muted/50 + cursor-pointer on clickable rows. ui/table.tsx:48 includes hover:bg-muted/50. ResponsiveTable.tsx:70 has hover:bg-muted/50. Alerts page.tsx bulk action bar confirmed at line 448 comment M-P1-003.

checks.name: Notifications — grouped ×N, source names, severity borders, mark-all-read
checks.evidence: NotificationsPanel.tsx: groupNotifications() function implemented. count>1 shows '×N' suffix (line 198). source field present (line 65). getSeverityBorderColor() with borderLeft style (line 183). setLastRead() from useNotificationsStore stores ISO timestamp correctly.

checks.name: Sidebar — Lucide icons (Eye, Server, Bot, Lock) replacing emoji
checks.evidence: navigation.ts imports Eye, Server, Bot, Lock from lucide-react. getNavGroups() assigns icon: Eye (observability), Server (infrastructure), Bot (platform), Lock (admin). Sidebar.tsx renders <group.icon> component at line 173.

checks.name: Dashboard — no duplicate clusters, Quick Clusters widget, 2-col anomaly+utilization
checks.evidence: Quick Clusters widget at page.tsx:559 with comment M-P1-006. 2-col grid at page.tsx:431: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2. AnomalyWidget imported and rendered. No duplicate clusters section in non-skeleton render path.

checks.name: Light Mode — bg rgb(248,250,252), white cards, shadows and borders
checks.evidence: globals.css light theme: --color-bg-primary: rgb(248, 250, 252). --color-bg-card: #ffffff. --shadow-card: 0 1px 3px... M-P1-007 adds box-shadow to .rounded-xl in html.light. --color-border: hsl(220, 13%, 91%). Polished implementation with hover states.

checks.name: No console errors or broken imports
checks.evidence: kubectl logs voyager-web: Next.js 16.1.6 starts cleanly, Ready in 260ms. No build errors. Pod running (voyager-web-69cdc59b9-dz7p6 1/1 Running).

issues.description: PageHeader shared component uses font-extrabold instead of spec's font-bold. Dashboard inline h1 correctly uses font-bold. Minor inconsistency, not a regression — extrabold is visually stronger, not broken.
